en: expecting the worst, are you gonna drop the bomb or not?
ko: 최악을 예상하며, 폭탄을 떨어뜨릴 거야 말 거야?

en: Let us die young and let us live forever
ko: 젊어서 죽게 해줘, 그리고 영원히 살게 해줘

en: We don't have the power but we never say never
ko: 우리에게 힘은 없지만 절대 포기하지 않아

en: Sitting in a sandpit, life is a short trip
The music's for the sad men
Can you imagine when this race is won?
ko: 이 경주가 끝나면 상상할 수 있어?

en: Turn our golden faces into the sun
Praising the leaders we're getting into
The music's played by the mad men
Till you really wanna live forever
